details.text: Foshan is a city in Guangdong Province.
It is a wonderful place to live and visit.
Foshan is famous for its long history and rich culture.
It is the birthplace of many traditional Chinese arts and Chinese kung fu.
People here also love Guangdong opera.
The opera is full of interesting stories.
the food in Foshan is amazing.
You can taste delicious morning tea and traditional dishes here.
There are many lovely parks in Foshan.
People like to do exercise and relax there.
Foshan is like a big and warm family with friendly people.
It is truly a special city!

chap_info.intro_text: 听三段对话或短文，每段播放两遍。各段播放前你有10秒钟的阅题时间。各段播放后有两个问题，每个问题有8秒钟的回答时间。在听到“开始录音”的信号后，请根据所听到的问题和括号内的提示，选择正确的信息口头回答问题；当听到“停止录音”的信号时，立即中止答题。

听第二段对话，回答第3-4两个问题。现在你有10秒钟的阅题时间。

title.text:
M: Lily, did you hear the news? Master Rao Baolian is coming to our school to teach paper cutting! 
W: Really? That's so cool! I've always wanted to learn from her. 
M: Me, too. She's such an amazing artist. 
W: When is she coming? 
M: Next week! Our art teacher just told us the news during class. 
W: Wow, I'm excited to hear the news. I can't wait to see what designs she'll show us.

W: Hey, Max. What do you like doing during the Dragon Boat Festival?  
M: I really like watching dragon boat races.  
W: Why do you like watching them?  
M: Because it is so exciting to see different teams race against each other. It's a fantastic way to celebrate the holiday.  
W: Sounds great! By the way, do you have any plans for this weekend?  
M: Yes. I will study at home on Saturday morning. I will go shopping on Saturday afternoon. On Sunday morning, I will go to the zoo.

W: Hey, Vince. Have you started working on our winter holiday video project? 
M: No. But I have thought about it. I want to show the Spring Festival flower market in Foshan in our video. 
W: Good idea! We can show what flowers people usually buy before the Spring Festival. 
M: Yeah, and we can chat with some local flower sellers and get their wishes for the new year.
W: Fantastic! But I think we should make a plan first.
M: I think so. We can make a plan today and start working on the project tomorrow.
W: OK. I will bring my camera tomorrow.
M: Great!
